subcodes.first_line: God willing, mayest thou be enraptured by the mention of the True One and gladdened by His remembrance. The heart, which is the seat of divine revelation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله بذکر حق مشعوف باشی و بیادش مسرور قلب که محل تجلی الهیه است از
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @living waters; water of life, @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @call to action
